lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to model the exploration FSD, scoop and internal fit and confirm the engineered jump range.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Python ship page — manufacturer, hull specs, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Hardpoint and optional-internal slot sizes, FSD class and hull mass behind the exploration loadout tables.

sources.label: Inara — Python
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, internal layout and shipyard pricing used for the cost and range figures.

sources.label: Fandom — Python
sources.what: Faulcon DeLacy lore and role context backing the exploration write-up.
